color.description: Represents the style settings of the field in YouTrack.

readSharingSettings.description: Stores users and groups that have access to a tag or a saved search.

tagSharingSettings.description: Stores users and groups that have access to a tag.

updateSharingSettings.description: Stores users and groups that have access to a tag or a saved search.

externalIssue.description: For an issue that was imported from another service, represents the reference to the issue in the external system.

visibility.description: Represents visibility settings of an entity, for example, an issue or a comment.

voters.description: Represents users that have voted for the issue or its duplicates.

watchers.description: Represents users that are subscribed to notifications about the issue.

profiles.description: Represents a group of settings of a user profile in YouTrack.

locale.description: Represents a language locale that is used in UI.

periodFormat.description: Represents the format, in which the period values are displayed to the user.

value.description: Represents a value of the text field. Returns both source and rendered text.

field.description: Represents project settings for a custom field with a defined set of values.

condition.description: Represents the condition for showing a custom field.

event.description: Represents a transition from one value to another for a custom field that is managed by a state-machine rule in workflow.
